message:
fix(dog): add name validation to prevent path traversal and empty-name deletion (gt-6cft8)

Remove('') resolved to os.RemoveAll(kennelPath), destroying all dogs.
dogDir() did filepath.Join with no validation, allowing names like
../../etc to escape the kennel. Add validateDogName() guard to all
public methods that accept a name parameter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
